title: The Raid Turns Across Onigashima
description: On pages 2–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Big Mom, King as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Castle Interior

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Roaring Inferno Con-Sumes All!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: DOUSE THE FIRE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Put it out!! We need water!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It burns!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Orotch!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kin'emon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: OROCHI- SAMA...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're unaware that you already met your demise once today.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Please Flee, I shall handle--

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IMBECILE!! I would be surrounded if I went back now!! Besides, Kaido has already softened them up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: GufU- Hahaha- HAHA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The truth about Kanjuro must've come as a shock, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I admit I was also shocked by you, Kyoshiro!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gufufu... I suppose you're both adept at deception!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You half-dead failures don't frighten me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to consume you and put an end to your misery!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You ghosts will pay for haunting me over the last 20 years!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Orochi- Sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't have time to waste on the likes of you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You'll be judged in hell!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You wish to avenge him?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm surprised Fukuro- Kuju!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You show such devotion to a dead fool.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I could say the same thing about all of you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were Fated to clash before we ever chose sides!! You know that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: RAIZO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ONI- GASHIMA, ROOFTOP

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kaido, let's try a combined attack.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder how many of the five will survive.

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Mama- Mamamama Hahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Trafalgar, can't you use your powers to send one of them away?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would've done it already if I could!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their HAKI is too strong, I can't move them directly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Fine,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We'll just tear them apart!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Heads up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They're gonna do something big!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope you can still swing that, HAG!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who Do You Think You're Talking To, Brat!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 40 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
